name: inaedaa-blast
description: iNaedaa Blast — Smart WhatsApp Campaign Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w apps/api" "npm run start -w apps/web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
